title: The Red Sea Tools
description: Change your vanilla tool to be cooler and better
body:
Resourcepack changes the tools pickaxe, axe, sword, hoe, shovel and spear with ocean style with anchor model in this resourcepack changes some ore such as netherite, diamond, golden, iron, stone and wooden

Created By [@Cviko](https://www.tiktok.com/@.cviko?_r=1&_t=ZS-95M70D9b3uk)

I hope you like it
